steps.title: Identify the defining feature of the claim
steps.content: The claim centers on Du Bois experiencing an intuitive and unexpected sense of cultural recognition — something he hadn't known before, yet instantly felt as his own. The key signal is this contrast: unfamiliarity transformed into instant recognition.

steps.title: Match the contrast to the quotation
steps.content: Choice B expresses this exactly: songs coming to him unknown, yet instantly recognized as his own (“They came out of the South unknown to me... and yet at once I knew them as of me and of mine”), with “stirred me strangely” capturing the unexpected intuition. The other choices focus on the music's cultural importance (A), its authenticity and preservation (C), or its historical origins (D) — none convey that personal feeling of unexpected recognition. That matches choice B — B is correct.
